text: As I enter this brightly lit, modern space, I find myself captivated by the interplay of technology and human advancement displayed before me. The bold R+D wall, filled with screens and text, invites contemplation about innovation and the restless pursuit of progress. I feel curious and somewhat energized, surrounded by evidence of human ingenuity. This place encourages me to reflect on our relationship with technology, and how we strive to connect and coexist with the intelligent machines we create.
